description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low fence and landscaped yard, featuring palm trees, grass patches, and paved driveways. The exterior walls are painted blue and white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The front yard includes a driveway with two parked cars and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is equipped with a patio area, outdoor seating, and additional green space, making it ideal for relaxation and gatherings. The roof is flat, and the overall layout is open, with clear separation between indoor living spaces and outdoor amenities. The property is well-maintained, with a mix of hardscape and softscape elements enhancing its curb appeal.
description: A modern, single-story blue-and-white bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, and spacious outdoor living areas, enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, palm trees, and a large patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue exterior, backyard patio, and additional palm trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, green space, and the open layout of the house with visible interior rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage area, more palm trees, and a clear view of the fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
